text_content.text: Mary has been an invaluable resource in my professional journey. She has been a trusted advisor whenever I face challenges or decisions related to my career. Her ability to listen, provide thoughtful insights, and offer constructive feedback has been instrumental in my growth. Whether it's reviewing materials, assessing situations, or preparing for interviews, her guidance consistently supports both my confidence and success in the workplace.

text_content.text: Called to Public Service and Bringing People Together to Get Things Done;  She was Elected to her first of many student leadership positions in 7th Grade! This position launched her into  community projects (park/garden development) as well as teamwork and facilitation. She expanded the scope of the club.

runs.text: Called to Public Service and Bringing People Together to Get Things Done;  She was Elected to her first of many student leadership positions in 7
Grade! This position launched her into  community projects (park/garden development) as well as teamwork and facilitation. She expanded the scope of the club.

text_content.text: And at her school reunion she as asked ”What did your dad do?” “He sold so many girl scout cookies and stuff at his company for you to win!.”  What? that was all Mary – the girl scout and student selling door to door, winning many sales awards with her enthusiasm and vision. While her dad worked blue-collar? shifts to support his family and their futures.

runs.text: And at her school reunion she as asked ”What did your dad do?” “He sold so many girl scout cookies and stuff at his company for you to win!.”  What? that was all Mary – the girl scout and student selling door to door, winning many sales awards with her enthusiasm and vision. While her dad worked blue-collar? shifts to support his family and their futures.

text_content.text: By the time she was in High School she was not only elected in positions within her schools but also was a Junior Statesman, Girls State etc.  She designed, attracted participants in the “Government Day in Los Angeles” where students around the region met with public officials and personally observed the actions of area institutions.

text_content.text: First Generation to College she work her way through college attaining a B.A. in political science. During those years, selected as a U.S. Congressional Intern, she bought herself a  ticket to D.C. for her first ever plane ride and tracked and reported on Congressional policy development.

runs.text: First Generation to College she work her way through college attaining a B.A. in political science. During those years, selected as a U.S. Congressional Intern, she bought herself a  ticket to D.C. for her first ever plane ride and tracked and reported on Congressional policy development.

text_content.text: Always fascinated by the earth, she minored in geography, laying a foundation for later work with land use planning, parks, scientists and policy makers.

runs.text: Always fascinated by the earth, she minored in geography, laying a foundation for later work with land use planning, parks, scientists and policy makers.

text_content.text: Her chance “ to work in the private sector solving public sector problems”. She volunteered in relevant work and was thrilled to be offered her dream job, with a mutual two year commitment to expertise development. There she honed her understanding and skills in land use economics, conducting studies, research and analytics, all to discover that she was most interested in the meetings. The development and (execution) conduct of public and private partnerships and the roles and responsibilities of those involved and effected directly and indirectly.

text_content.text: HER Story – UCLA to County Staff

runs.text: HER Story – UCLA to County Staff

text_content.text: While continuing her work as a consultant she focused on her Masters Degree in Urban Planning. Knowing the value of specific expertise she independently took courses from the UCLA School of Law and Anderson Business School and excelled in the multi-disciplinary courses the included design and architecture, geography and land use, economics, sociology, governance and citizenship etc.

runs.text: While continuing her work as a consultant she focused on her Masters Degree in Urban Planning. Knowing the value of specific expertise she independently took courses from the UCLA School of Law and Anderson Business School and excelled in the multi-disciplinary courses the included design and architecture, geography and land use, economics, sociology, governance and citizenship etc.

text_content.text: Her next professional path was public sector in California Redevelopment followed by independent consulting in Oregon to attain her Senior Planner Role in County Government. The diversity of County work and leaders was foundational to her (almost 20 or over 15?) satisfaction in the “special projects” role she would become known for as she facilitated complex people and projects to evolve productively.

text_content.text: A trusted ally with unwavering focus on client service she thrived in the creative role of helping people become better participants in their teams at work, teams improving their agility and clarity of purpose and organizations becoming more agile and fun.  Organizational Development and Community Development are Personal.  Change management is motivational stewardship to accomplishing what is most important to the clients, an organization of people serving a purpose with enthusiasm and enlightenment that their performance  matters. A transformational process designed and conducted with expertise to facilitate people’s ability to accomplish what is most important to them.

text_content.text: HER Story – Consultancy Transformed

After recent years of “unprecedented change” across civic society and public organizations specifically, Accomplish Points is dedicated to re-imagining and re-building civic participation, partnerships and private and public service.  Engaging in the  “re-imaging” and “re-working” ahead with skill and reliability in personal and organizational development and transformation .

runs.text: After recent years of “unprecedented change” across civic society and public organizations specifically, Accomplish Points is dedicated to re-imagining and re-building civic participation, partnerships and private and public service.  Engaging in the  “re-imaging” and “re-working” ahead with skill and reliability in personal and organizational development and transformation .

text_content.text: May’s expertise in consensus building, process design and facilitation, project scoping and management, delivery of entrepreneurial energy for clients.

runs.text: May’s expertise in consensus building, process design and facilitation, project scoping and management, delivery of entrepreneurial energy for clients.

text_content.text: Mary serves from an appointment within an organization with a dutiful and enthusiastic alignment with staff and leaders to deliver excellence within an organization.  The roles and responsibilities within the organizational framework empower a staff position. Mary serves internally – as interim, temp or part time – when that internal operations role is valuable to accomplish what is needed.

runs.text: Mary serves from an appointment within an organization with a dutiful and enthusiastic alignment with staff and leaders to deliver excellence within an organization.  The roles and responsibilities within the organizational framework empower a staff position. Mary serves internally – as interim, temp or part time – when that internal operations role is valuable to accomplish what is needed.

text_content.text: Mary serves as consultant with the helpfulness of fresh perspective and agility to focus on performing the agreed upon roles and responsibilities of contracted services. Leaders hire Mary to provide expertise in listening, assessing and analyzing needs and partnering to accomplish what is most important.   This role allows Mary agility and support for people’s growth and teamwork and often a client candor that facilitates evolution and change. The constraints of “in-house” role are removed and specific change and growth targets are more available. Re-imagining and re-constructing, the smart risk taking of “outside the box” viewing and drafting scenarios are of tremendous value.

text_content.text: After her clients asked her to “write a book” so you can teach us ”how you do what you do” she relocated to sunny Bend Oregon and remains focused on client services. Mary’s response to “unprecedented change”, was to re-assess and re-scope.  With rededication to the personal skills of consensus building and engagement skills
